programs.title: Shor In The City
programs.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programs.title: Chalo Dilli
programs.desc: Mihika, an investment banker, misses her flight to Delhi and meets Manu Gupta, a talkative man. In order to reach Delhi on time, she must tag along with Manu and put up with his antics.

programs.title: Heyy Babyy
programs.desc: Akshay Kumar, Vidya Balan, Fardeen Khan, Ritesh Deshmukh, Anupam Kher, Boman Irani
